sub_goals.description: Firebase init + Google SSO + onAuthStateChange wrapper
User account card + nickname editor + notification toggles + 4-color toggle
Landing surface + sign-in button + OttoBLD-themed shell

verification_summary: All 7 acceptance assertions (S1.A1-A7) verified via integrated artifact static + behavior inspection. Sign-in button visible above the fold; OAuth target hostname accounts.google.com; user-card panel exposes all four required controls; nickname persists via Firestore /players/{uid}; 4-color toggle updates CSS variables --suit-diamond and --suit-club.
